content.en:
The reason why the Blood Ancestor recruited Ye Tian to join the Universe Alliance was because it was very difficult to join the Universe Alliance, and not all high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth stage could join the Universe Alliance.

If they could all join, countless Great Ancestors would have already joined.

In fact, the selection of members of the Cosmosphere Alliance is very strict, and only a very small number of fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms are eligible to join the Cosmosphere Alliance.

Although the Blood Ancestor said that it had something to do with the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, the Universal Alliance didn't look at this at all.

"Endless Great Ancestor, I tried to join the Cosmos Alliance before, but I failed in the task assessment they gave me. So, I want to team up with you and join the Universal Alliance together!"

"These are two Universal Orders, one Universal Order can apply to join the Universal Alliance once, and if it fails, it will be withdrawn. The Universal Alliance allows teams to participate, but it will be more difficult. If you fail to join the Universal Alliance this time, I will compensate you with a Universal Order, which will allow you to apply to join the Universal Alliance alone!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, it would not be bad for him, so he agreed.

"Okay, I agree to go with you to apply to join the Universal Alliance!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor went to the Universal Alliance together.

The Universal Order does not have the ability to allow the Great Ancestors to reach the Universal Alliance in an instant, and the Universal Alliance cannot do such a means, only the Heavenly Ancestors can do it.

Therefore, if you want to apply to join the Universal Order, you must find a way to enter one of the stations of the Universal Alliance, the King Kong River Realm!

The Vajra River Realm is not a territory, but it is equivalent to a world like the Silent Black Sea.

The entire Vajra River Realm is completely owned by the Huanyu Alliance, and if you want to join the Huanyu Alliance, you must come to the Vajra River Realm.

If you don't even have the ability to come to the Vajra River Realm, then you are not qualified to join the Universal Alliance.

It is naturally easy to go to the King Kong River Realm from the Xuanqi Territory, after all, the Xuanqi Territory has the Taichen Palace, and if you take the channel of the Taichen Palace, you can go to many Realms, and naturally you can also go to the King Kong River Realm.

It's just that borrowing the channels of Taichen Palace requires some resources.

Ye Tian could have hurried directly from the Infinite Realm Ruins to the King Kong River Realm, but the road was far away, and he didn't want to expose too many things in front of the Blood Ancestor.

So, he didn't choose this path.

So, Ye Tian and the Great Ancestor of the Bloody Dynasty borrowed the channel of the Taichen Palace to go to a large territory near the King Kong River Realm, the Taihe Territory.

Then enter the King Kong River Boundary from the Taihe Territory, and you can soon reach the King Kong River Boundary.

......

King Kong River Boundary.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor came here, and then entered the station of the Universal Alliance.

When they took out the Universal Order, the Great Ancestors of the Universal Alliance arranged a task assessment for Ye Tian and them, and only if the assessment was successful, they could officially join the Universal Alliance.

Soon, their task came down.

"Cross the Jinyan River and pick the immeasurable flame fruit!"

Seeing this task, the Bloody Great Ancestor frowned slightly.

"This task is too difficult!" the Bloody Great Ancestor frowned.

Ye Tian asked, "Blood Ancestor, what is the place of the Golden Yan River?"

The Blood Ancestor said: "The Jin Yan River is a very dangerous place, located in the Jin Yan Territory, but there are not many ordinary creatures in this Territory, just because of the existence of the Jin Yan River. The Jin Yan River erupted once, spreading throughout the Jin Yan Territory, causing the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms not to dare to touch the flames of the Jin Yan River. And the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit is a treasure in the depths of the Golden Yan River, if you want to pick this Infinite Realm Flame Fruit, you must go deep into the Golden Yan River, and the flames alone will make me unbearable. Moreover, there is also a Golden Flame Beast clan in the Golden Flame River, the strength of this clan is very strong, and there are also high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fifth stage, and they are very exclusive!"

Ye Tian finally knew why the Blood Ancestor was worried at this time, if he encountered the fifth-stage Golden Flame Beast, he would be killed in an instant.

"Why don't you give up!"

The Blood Ancestor said.

This assessment task is really too difficult, he doesn't want to fall because of this mission, then it's not necessary, it's a big deal to apply to join with the Huanyu Order next time, and then the task will be different, maybe it won't be so difficult.

"No, let's participate!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Participate?" the Blood Ancestor was taken aback, "This is going to meet a fifth-stage Golden Flame Beast!"

"I'll block it!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

The Blooded Great Ancestor looked at Ye Tian deeply, "Endless Great Ancestor, isn't your current strength enough to rival the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian was not modest and admitted it directly.

Seeing this, the Bloody Great Ancestor no longer refused.

Immediately, they began to head to the Jinyan Realm.

......

Jin Yan Realm, when Ye Tian and the Raccoon Blood Ancestor came here, they really saw the horror of the Jin Yan River flames.

"What a terrifying flame, the power in this seems to be able to incinerate immeasurable lifeforms, and even the flesh and blood of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms can't bear it!"

Ye Tian stepped into the Jin Yan River in one step, and the flames continued to burn his body, but after all, he had undergone eight full-body tempering, and the immeasurable bones of his whole body had reached super-quality, and the immeasurable blood of his whole body was about to reach super-quality.

It can be said that the strength of his physical body is no less than that of an ordinary fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and the flames here naturally cannot cause him harm.

However, the Bloody Great Ancestor put a hand into it, and it was directly burned to the point of flesh and blood.

"My cultivation is too weak, I can't enter the Jin Yan River!"

The Blood Ancestor said helplessly.

"Blood Ancestor, you just stay here, I'll go pick the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit by myself!" Ye Tian proposed.

"Good!"

The Blood Ancestor nodded.

Anyway, the Huanyu Alliance didn't require them all to enter the Jinyan River, only asked to cross the Jinyan River and pick the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit back, and the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit was the certificate.

As long as the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit is obtained from here, that's it!

Airplanes!

Ye Tian stepped in and rushed into the Jin Yan River, and soon lost sight of his figure.

Soon, some Golden Flame Beasts discovered Ye Tian and rushed over one after another.

"Get out!"

Ye Tianyi slapped those golden flame beasts away and did not kill them.

However, the steady stream of Golden Flame Beasts came in, making him impatient.

"Die!"

Ye Tian shot with all his strength, amputated his fingers and exploded, killing the golden flame beasts one by one.

His speed was very fast, and in the blink of an eye, he came to the depths of the Jinyan River.

He was looking for the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit, and as long as he found one, even if it was not ripe, he could hand in the task.

That's when it happened.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura emerged, and it was a fifth-stage golden flame beast.
